2022-2023 Academic Year Opening Ceremony was Held with Wide Participation

26.09.2022

2022-2023 Academic Year Opening Ceremony was held on Monday, September 26 at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

Ibn Haldun University 2022-2023 Academic Year Opening Ceremony was held on Monday, September 26 at the Ibn Haldun University Complex. The ceremony, which was held with the wide participation of our Board of Trustees, academicians and students, was also broadcast live on our corporate Youtube channel.

At the ceremony, our Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz, our Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan made a greeting speech. The Opening Lecture was delivered by Bilgi University Vice Rector Prof. Ege Yazgan, “What Does Money Matter?” given the title.
